name: @JoeCardoso13/greenhouse
description: MCP server for the public Greenhouse Job Board API, focused on polling boards and normalizing job postings.

tools.name: get_job_board
tools.description: Fetch the board-level name and intro content for a Greenhouse board token.

tools.name: list_company_jobs
tools.description: List current public Greenhouse job postings for a board.

tools.name: get_job_details
tools.description: Fetch a single job posting with optional questions and pay transparency data.

tools.name: list_departments
tools.description: List departments and their jobs for a Greenhouse board.

tools.name: list_offices
tools.description: List offices and their department/job groupings for a Greenhouse board.

tools.name: normalize_job_data
tools.description: Map Greenhouse jobs into a stable normalized schema for downstream storage.

tools.name: inspect_job_attributes
tools.description: Report whether salary, experience-level, workplace-type, and related metadata are present for a job.

tools.name: list_new_or_updated_jobs
tools.description: Compare current jobs against a prior snapshot to detect new or changed postings.
